channel.title: Academic on AI Detector — Detect AI-Generated Text Instantly
channel.description: Recent content in Academic on AI Detector — Detect AI-Generated Text Instantly

item.title: Can Turnitin Detect ChatGPT? (2026 Answer)
item.description: Does Turnitin catch ChatGPT writing? We break down exactly how Turnitin's AI detection works, its accuracy rate, what it misses — and what students and teachers actually need to know.
